meaning: n.荳肴勹豌皮憾蜀ｵ荳倶ｹ狗黄莉ｷ荳頑ｶｨ
examples: Many of the industrialized economies would be pushed into a cycle of stagflation.
There is also the prospect of a mild form of stagflation building, or so some economists say.
Economic stagnation plus Fed activism equals stagflation: we saw it all thirty-five years ago.
